g.text: Disk Image Detection and Geometry Ownership
This shows the mount-time path from a configured URI to an
`IDiskImage`, and where geometry detection/validation currently lives.
`ProbeRegistry` chooses a candidate `ImageType` from content, path,
and hints. `ImageRegistry` then constructs the selected `IDiskImage`.
Image handlers still own final validation and sector I/O semantics.
Hint or probe geometry can be supplied
Otherwise it falls back to 256-byte sectors.
Extension point for new image formats:
2. Add/register an `IDiskImage` implementation for final mount
